query:
SELECT 
  contactName,
  description,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(lineAmount) as totalRevenue,
  AVG(unitAmount) as avgUnit
FROM billing_items
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%' 
   OR description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
   OR description LIKE '%Retail%'
   OR description LIKE '%bundle%'
GROUP BY contactName, description
ORDER BY contactName
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
  contactName,
  description,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(lineAmount) as totalRevenue,
  AVG(unitAmount) as avgUnit
FROM billing_items
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%' 
   OR description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
   OR description LIKE '%Retail%'
   OR description LIKE '%bundle%'
GROUP BY contactName, description
ORDER BY contactName
LIMIT 20;
